name: Insurance Claim Status
description: Returns the status of an insurance claim: claim amount, status, incident date, and adjuster. Looks up a single claim by claim_id, or all claims filed against a policy by policy_id.

skills.name: get_claim_status
skills.description: Retrieve the status of an insurance claim — amount, status, incident date, and adjuster — by claim ID, or list all claims on a policy.
examples: what is the claim status for CLM-5501
show me the status of the claim
are there any open claims on this policy
who is the adjuster on this claim
what is the claim amount for the Continental Freight policy
